stemHtml: If a missed approach is initiated before the MAPt, at what altitude/height should the aircraft overfly the MAPt?

options.a: At the corresponding approach altitude/height minima.
options.b: A turn may be initiated without overflying the MAPt.
options.c: Initiating before the MAPt is prohibited.
options.d: At any altitude/height equal to or above that required by the procedure.
